summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: Nexthop AI, MatX, and Ayar Labs each closed half-billion-dollar rounds, while smaller plays like Frore Systems ($143M) and Sunday ($165M) also landed major checks. With 7 local companies actively hiring and over $4 billion raised in the past six weeks alone, the region's AI and semiconductor bets are accelerating despite broader economic headwinds.
